# Modeling Virality and Community Behavior Over Time on Reddit

## Setup

1. Unzip `data.zip` and place the contents in your Google Drive under `Social_Media_Mining_Project/data/`
2. All notebooks are designed to run in **Google Colab**

## Run Order

Notebooks must be run in this order:

```
data_loading → features → eda → modeling → temporal_network
```

## Generated Files

The following files are produced by the pipeline but were not commited to the GitHub repo due to size (**Must run code to generate**):

| File | Generated by |
|---|---|
| `outputs/features.parquet` | `features.ipynb` |
| `outputs/title_embeddings.npy` | `features.ipynb` |
| `outputs/final_with_clusters.parquet` | `temporal_network.ipynb` |
